SDK Types

SDK Types

Section titled “SDK Types”

Squad Federation provides TypeScript interfaces and Zod schemas in the packages/sdk/src/ directory.

Core Interfaces

Section titled “Core Interfaces”

TeamPlacement

Section titled “TeamPlacement”

Abstracts where team files live (worktree, directory, custom).

TeamCommunication

Section titled “TeamCommunication”

Abstracts how teams exchange signals (file-signal, teams-channel).

TeamContext

Section titled “TeamContext”

High-level team workspace interface combining placement and communication.

Data Schemas

Section titled “Data Schemas”

SignalMessage

Section titled “SignalMessage”

Zod Schema:

LearningEntry

Section titled “LearningEntry”

Zod Schema:

ScanStatus

Section titled “ScanStatus”

Zod Schema:
